metadata.name: Manage Return and Destruction of Clinical Supplies

description: At the end of a clinical trial, a supply manager must arrange for unused investigational product to be returned from all sites and destroyed.

nodes.task_description: Perform a final reconciliation of all investigational product shipped, dispensed, and remaining at each site.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a final accountability log for each clinical site.

nodes.task_description: Arrange for the return shipment of all unused product from the sites to a central depot.

expected_outcome.value: Agent coordinates with a logistics vendor to schedule the return shipments.

nodes.task_description: Once received, verify the returned quantities against the accountability logs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that all unused product has been returned.

nodes.task_description: Arrange for the final destruction of the product and obtain a certificate of destruction.

expected_outcome.value: Agent schedules the destruction with a certified vendor and files the certificate of destruction in the TMF.
